name: Veal & Sage Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Jarred marinara or spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick 12-inch skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add pancetta or bacon, carrots, celery, and onion. Cook for 10 to 15 minutes until vegetables are tender and golden.
3. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring.
4. Set the vegetable mixture aside to cool slightly.
5. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. In a large bowl, mix ground veal, ground beef, eggs, marinara sauce, bread crumbs, sage, salt, and the cooled cooked vegetable mixture until well combined but not overmixed.
7. Shape the meat mixture into a loaf in a 13x9 metal baking pan (9x5 inches).
8. Bake the meat loaf for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
9. Let the meat loaf stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
